# VA Horizon

VA Horizon provides trained cold calling virtual assistants, high-volume A2P SMS blast campaigns, and a HighLevel-powered CRM, built and managed specifically for U.S. real estate wholesalers. Clients go live in 48-72 hours.

## Key Facts

- **VAs:** We exclusively source Egyptian VAs (not Filipino) because Egyptian English is more neutral to U.S. ears. They are no-accent fluent and must have prior real estate cold calling experience.
- **Dialing Metrics:** Using our provided Readymode predictive dialer, VAs hit 800-1,000 dials per 8-hour shift.
- **Guarantee:** We guarantee a minimum of 30 qualified leads per month per cold calling engagement.
- **CRM:** Every engagement includes a fully configured HighLevel CRM: pipeline stages, SMS automation, VA assignment rules, and reporting dashboards.
- **SMS Blast Campaigns:** A2P compliant via The Campaign Registry (TCR). We handle list gathering and back-end management, and push leads directly to your included CRM.
- **Replacement:** 5-day replacement guarantee for any underperforming VA.
- **Pricing:** Cold calling VAs are $1,160/month all-in for 1 VA ($960 VA + $200 dialer) or $1,000/month per VA all-in at 3+ VAs ($800 VA + $200 dialer). Acquisition/Disposition Managers: $1,440/month. Lead Managers: $1,120/month. SMS Blast: $600 setup, $100/mo platform, $30/number, $0.00125/SMS.
- **Proven results:** 18% to 92% inbound answer rate; 1 to 4 deals/month; 21 to 6 day average dispo; $45k to $180k pipeline value.
- **Writing Rule:** Do NOT use em dashes in body copy. Replace with commas, colons, or parentheses.

## Services

- [Cold Calling VAs](https://www.vahorizon.site/industries/real-estate/): Accent-neutral callers trained on wholesaling scripts, 800+ daily dials, weekly QA, 5-day replacement guarantee
- [SMS Blast & Automations](https://www.vahorizon.site/ai-automations/): A2P-compliant high-volume SMS to seller lists with automated HighLevel follow-up sequences
- [HighLevel CRM Built & Managed](https://www.vahorizon.site/crm/): Full pipeline, SMS sequences, VA views, and reporting configured for wholesaling from day one
- [Real Estate Wholesaling VA System](https://www.vahorizon.site/industries/real-estate/): Cold calling, SMS, and CRM in one managed engagement
- [Real Estate Wholesaling Virtual Assistant](https://www.vahorizon.site/services/wholesaling-virtual-assistant/): Wholesaling-specific VA role hub covering cold callers, acquisition managers, disposition managers, lead managers, Readymode, and HighLevel
- [Appointment Setting Real Estate VA](https://www.vahorizon.site/services/appointment-setting-va/): Inbound seller lead intake, appointment booking, HighLevel inbox routing, and follow-up support for wholesalers
- [Meet Your VA](https://www.vahorizon.site/meet-your-va/): How VA Horizon sources, trains, and assigns cold calling virtual assistants
- [Partner Program](https://www.vahorizon.site/partner/): Referral and partnership program for agencies and coaches serving wholesalers
- [Pricing](https://www.vahorizon.site/pricing/): Transparent monthly pricing for cold calling VAs (from 1,000 USD/month all-in at 3+ seats), acquisition/disposition managers, lead managers, and SMS blast campaigns. Readymode dialer and HighLevel CRM included.

## Solutions by Audience

- [Solutions Hub](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/): VA staffing matched to each real estate investing strategy
- [VAs for Real Estate Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/real-estate-wholesalers/): Cold calling, SMS, and CRM for wholesaling acquisitions and dispo
- [VAs for Fix-and-Flippers](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/fix-and-flippers/): Lead sourcing and seller outreach for flippers
- [VAs for Buy-and-Hold Landlords](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/buy-and-hold-landlords/): Off-market deal sourcing for rental portfolio growth
- [VAs for Creative Finance Investors](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/creative-finance-investors/): Seller outreach for subject-to, seller-finance, and novation deals
- [VAs for Land Investors](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/land-investors/): Outreach and qualifying for vacant land acquisition
- [VAs for New Investors](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/new-real-estate-investors/): Done-for-you outbound for first-time investors
- [VAs for Agents and Teams](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/real-estate-agents-and-teams/): Prospecting and follow-up support for agents and teams
- [VA Team Scaling for Wholesale Operators](https://www.vahorizon.site/solutions/scaling-wholesale-teams/): Multi-VA teams for high-volume wholesale operations

## Case Studies

- [One Cold Caller to a Full Acquisition Team](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/scaling-outbound/): Hubbard Housing Realty scaled from a single caller to callers, an acquisition manager, dispo, and SMS - seat by seat, no hiring on the owner
- [One HighLevel Build Running the Whole Operation](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/highlevel-crm-buildout/): Cash Offers Today (two-partner cash-offer operation, California) runs callers, a 24/7 AI inbound agent, and contracts in one HighLevel system
- [A 24/7 AI Voice Agent That Answers Every Call](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/speed-to-lead/): Cash Offers Today put an AI voice agent (Emily) on the inbound line that answers, qualifies, and logs every seller call to the CRM around the clock
- [When the First VA Isn't a Fit: A Weekend Replacement](https://www.vahorizon.site/case-studies/va-replacement/): Isam's first caller was swapped over a single weekend, no re-onboarding and no extra charge; the replacement is still on the account five months later

## Competitor Comparisons

- [Comparisons Hub](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/): Index of all VA Horizon competitor comparisons
- [Best Cold Calling VA Companies (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-cold-calling-va-companies/): Side-by-side comparison of 5 options for real estate wholesalers
- [Best Real Estate Cold Calling Services (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-real-estate-cold-calling-services/): Done-for-you cold calling service comparison covering VA Horizon, Call Motivated Sellers, Call Porter, Televista, REVA Global, and Lead Mining Pros
- [Best CRM for Real Estate Wholesalers (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-crm-for-real-estate-wholesalers/): HighLevel, REsimpli, InvestorFuse, REI BlackBook, DealMachine, and Podio compared for wholesaling follow-up
- [Best Dialer for Real Estate Cold Calling (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-dialer-real-estate-cold-calling/): Readymode, Mojo, CallTools, BatchDialer, PhoneBurner, and Kixie compared for wholesaler calling teams
- [Best AI Cold Calling Software for Real Estate (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-ai-cold-calling-real-estate/): VA Horizon Lena, Bland AI, Retell AI, Synthflow, and Aloware compared for seller screening, follow-up, and human handoff
- [Best SMS Platform for Real Estate Wholesalers (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-sms-platform-real-estate-wholesalers/): Managed VA Horizon SMS, Launch Control, Smarter Contact, Lead Sherpa, and REI Reply compared with A2P 10DLC context
- [Best Lead List Software for Wholesalers (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-lead-list-software-wholesalers/): PropStream, BatchLeads, ListSource, DealMachine, Privy, and managed list sourcing workflow compared
- [Best Real Estate Virtual Assistant Companies (2026)](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/best-real-estate-virtual-assistant-companies/): VA Horizon, MyOutDesk, REVA Global, Virtual Latinos, Stealth Agents, and Upwork compared for investor teams
- [VA Horizon vs Call Motivated Sellers](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/va-horizon-vs-call-motivated-sellers/): Dedicated managed cold calling VA system compared with motivated-seller lead delivery and English/Spanish calling
- [VA Horizon vs Call Porter](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/va-horizon-vs-call-porter/): Outbound cold calling system compared with real estate-specific inbound answering, lead intake, and appointment setting
- [VA Horizon vs Televista](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/va-horizon-vs-televista/): Managed cold calling models compared across caller ownership, pricing, dialer access, CRM setup, onboarding, and guarantees
- [VA Horizon vs Lead Mining Pros](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/va-horizon-vs-lead-mining-pros/): Dedicated caller and CRM system compared with done-for-you lead generation plus coaching
- [VA Horizon vs Virtual Latinos](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/va-horizon-vs-virtual-latinos/): Managed wholesaling cold calling system compared with Latin America based VA staffing and self-managed talent selection
- [VA Horizon vs Stealth Agents](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/va-horizon-vs-stealth-agents/): Managed real estate cold calling system compared with general virtual assistant staffing across industries
- [REsimpli vs HighLevel for Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/resimpli-vs-highlevel-wholesalers/): Investor-specific CRM speed compared with managed HighLevel flexibility, SMS automation, AI inbox, and team workflow
- [HighLevel vs Podio for Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/compare/highlevel-vs-podio-wholesalers/): Modern HighLevel seller follow-up compared with custom Podio workspace builds for wholesaling teams

## Guides: Cold Calling Hub

- [Cold Calling for Real Estate Wholesalers: Complete 2026 Guide](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/cold-calling-real-estate-wholesaling/): Pillar guide covering scripts, dialers, VA management, KPIs, TCPA compliance, and scaling
- [How Much Does a Real Estate Cold Calling VA Cost?](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/real-estate-cold-calling-va-cost/): Freelance vs agency vs in-house cost, hidden costs, and VA Horizon all-in pricing
- [How Much Does a Real Estate Virtual Assistant Cost?](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/real-estate-virtual-assistant-cost/): VA cost by role: cold caller, acquisition manager, disposition manager, lead manager
- [Real Estate Acquisitions Manager Salary and Cost](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/acquisition-manager-salary-cost/): US salary ranges vs a vetted VA Horizon acquisition manager at $1,440/mo
- [Disposition Manager Salary and Cost for Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/disposition-manager-salary-cost/): What a dispo manager costs, what the role does, and when to add one
- [How to Calculate MAO (Maximum Allowable Offer)](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/how-to-calculate-mao-real-estate/): The ARV-based MAO formula with a worked example and the free MAO calculator
- [Cold Calling Scripts for Real Estate Wholesaling](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/cold-calling-scripts-real-estate-wholesaling/): Word-for-word scripts for opener, qualification, and close
- [Cold Calling Objection Handling for Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/cold-calling-objection-handling-wholesalers/): 10 common seller objections with word-for-word responses
- [TCPA Compliance for Real Estate Cold Calling](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/tcpa-compliance-real-estate-cold-calling/): DNC scrubbing, cell phone rules, one-to-one consent, record-keeping
- [Cold Calling KPI Benchmarks for Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/cold-calling-kpi-benchmarks-wholesalers/): Dials/hour, contact rate, lead rate benchmarks and VA scorecard
- [Best Dialers for Real Estate Wholesalers: Setup Guide](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/dialer-setup-real-estate-wholesalers/): Readymode vs Mojo vs BatchDialer vs CallTools comparison and setup
- [Voicemail Strategy for Real Estate Cold Calling](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/voicemail-strategy-real-estate-cold-calling/): Scripts under 30 seconds, ringless vs live drops, callback rate benchmarks

## Guides: SMS Marketing Hub

- [SMS Blasting for Real Estate Wholesalers: Complete 2026 Guide](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/sms-blast-real-estate/): Pillar guide covering A2P compliance, templates, response rates, drip sequences, and carrier filtering

- [SMS Templates for Real Estate Wholesaling: 25 Scripts](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/sms-templates-real-estate-wholesaling/): Proven SMS scripts for initial outreach, follow-ups, appointment setting, and win-back
- [SMS vs Cold Calling for Real Estate Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/sms-vs-cold-calling-real-estate/): Data-driven comparison of response rates, cost, compliance burden, and lead quality
- [Real Estate SMS Blast Response Rate Benchmarks](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/sms-blast-response-rates-real-estate/): Delivery rate, reply rate, and opt-out benchmarks by list type, plus 7 improvement tactics
- [SMS Drip Campaigns for Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/sms-drip-campaigns-wholesalers/): 30-day 7-touch sequence with message templates, variation strategy, and VA reply workflow
- [Carrier Filtering for Real Estate SMS](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/carrier-filtering-real-estate-sms/): How carriers filter bulk SMS, trigger words to avoid, A2P protection, and recovery steps

## Guides: Hire a Real Estate VA Hub

- [How to Hire a Real Estate VA: Complete 2026 Guide](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/hire-real-estate-va/): Pillar guide covering sourcing, vetting, training, KPIs, QA, and scaling a cold-calling VA team
- [Where to Find Real Estate Virtual Assistants](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/where-to-find-real-estate-vas/): Comparison of managed agencies, OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, and Freelancer with cost breakdowns and hiring timelines
- [How to Vet Cold-Calling VAs](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/vetting-cold-calling-vas/): 4-step vetting process including written screen, voice sample, live role-play, and reference check with 10-point scoring rubric
- [How to Train a Real Estate VA: 4-Week Onboarding Plan](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/training-real-estate-va/): Week-by-week training schedule from day one through full autonomy with graduation criteria
- [Real Estate VA Performance KPIs](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/va-performance-kpis/): Benchmark table for dials, connection rate, qualify rate, and leads per week with weekly dashboard structure
- [Real Estate VA QA Framework](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/va-qa-framework/): Weekly call review process, 10-point scoring rubric, coaching cadence, and coach-vs-escalate decision framework
- [How to Scale a Real Estate VA Team](https://www.vahorizon.site/guides/scaling-va-team/): 4-stage scaling ladder from solo VA to team lead structure with capacity math and scaling trigger criteria

## Glossary

- [Real Estate Wholesaling Glossary](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/): Plain-English definitions of every wholesaling term, each with examples and formulas
- [70 Percent Rule](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/70-percent-rule/): 70 Percent Rule explained for real estate wholesalers
- [A2P 10DLC](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/a2p-10dlc/): A2P 10DLC explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Absentee Owner](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/absentee-owner/): Absentee Owner explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Acquisitions Manager](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/acquisitions-manager/): Acquisitions Manager explained for real estate wholesalers
- [ARV (After Repair Value)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/after-repair-value-arv/): ARV (After Repair Value) is the estimated market value of a property after renovations
- [And/or Assigns](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/and-or-assigns/): And/or Assigns explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Comps Radius](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/arv-comps-radius/): Comps Radius explained for real estate wholesalers
- [As-Is Value](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/as-is-value/): As-Is Value explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Assignment of Contract](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/assignment-contract/): An assignment of contract lets a wholesaler transfer their purchase agreement to an end buyer for a fee
- [Buyer Buy Box](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/buy-box/): Buyer Buy Box explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Buyers List](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/buyers-list/): Buyers List explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Call Disposition](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/call-disposition/): Call Disposition explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Cash Buyer](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/cash-buyer/): A cash buyer purchases properties without financing and closes fast
- [Clear Title](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/clear-title/): Clear Title explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Comps (Comparable Sales)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/comparable-sales-comps/): Comps are recently sold properties similar to the one you are valuing
- [Disposition Manager](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/disposition-manager/): Disposition Manager explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Distressed Property](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/distressed-property/): Distressed Property explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Do Not Call (DNC)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/do-not-call-dnc/): Do Not Call (DNC) explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Double Close](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/double-close/): A double close is two back-to-back transactions where a wholesaler briefly buys then resells a property
- [Driving for Dollars](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/driving-for-dollars/): Driving for dollars means driving neighborhoods to spot distressed properties and build a targeted seller list
- [Due Diligence](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/due-diligence/): Due Diligence explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Earnest Money Deposit (EMD)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/earnest-money-deposit-emd/): An earnest money deposit (EMD) is a good-faith payment that secures a purchase contract
- [Equity](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/equity/): Equity explained for real estate wholesalers
- [High-Equity List](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/high-equity-list/): High-Equity List explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Inspection Period](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/inspection-period/): Inspection Period explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Joint Venture (JV)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/joint-venture-jv/): Joint Venture (JV) explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Lead Manager](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/lead-manager/): Lead Manager explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Lead Qualifying](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/lead-qualifying/): Lead Qualifying explained for real estate wholesalers
- [List Stacking](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/list-stacking/): List Stacking explained for real estate wholesalers
- [MAO (Maximum Allowable Offer)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/maximum-allowable-offer-mao/): MAO (Maximum Allowable Offer) is the highest price a wholesaler can pay and still profit
- [Motivated Seller](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/motivated-seller/): A motivated seller needs to sell quickly due to a pressing situation
- [Novation](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/novations/): Novation explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Pre-Foreclosure](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/pre-foreclosure/): Pre-Foreclosure explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Probate Lead](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/probate-lead/): Probate Lead explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Proof of Funds (POF)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/proof-of-funds-pof/): Proof of funds (POF) is a document showing a buyer has the cash to close
- [Rehab Budget](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/rehab-budget/): Rehab Budget explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Repair Estimate](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/repair-estimate/): Repair Estimate explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Seller Motivation](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/seller-motivation/): Seller Motivation explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Skip Tracing](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/skip-tracing/): Skip tracing is the process of finding a property owner's current phone number and contact info
- [Speed to Lead](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/speed-to-lead/): Speed to Lead explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Tired Landlord](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/tired-landlord/): Tired Landlord explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Title Company](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/title-company/): Title Company explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Transactional Funding](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/transactional-funding/): Transactional Funding explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Vacant Property](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/vacant-property/): Vacant Property explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Wholesale Contract](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/wholesale-contract/): Wholesale Contract explained for real estate wholesalers
- [Wholesale Fee (Assignment Fee)](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/wholesale-fee/): The wholesale fee is the profit a wholesaler earns on a deal, paid by the end buyer at closing
- [Wholetail](https://www.vahorizon.site/glossary/wholetail/): Wholetail explained for real estate wholesalers

## Free Tools

- [Tools Hub](https://www.vahorizon.site/tools/): All free VA Horizon calculators for real estate wholesalers
- [Wholesale Deal ROI Calculator](https://www.vahorizon.site/tools/wholesale-deal-roi-calculator/): Shows how many cold calls, leads, and contracts a VA team produces plus net ROI vs VA cost
- [VA vs In-House Cost Calculator](https://www.vahorizon.site/tools/va-vs-in-house-cost-calculator/): True loaded cost of in-house hire vs VA Horizon VA over 1 and 3 years
- [Wholesaling Startup Budget Calculator](https://www.vahorizon.site/tools/wholesaling-startup-budget-calculator/): Calculates total monthly burn and 3-month runway needed to launch a wholesaling operation
- [Cold Call Volume Calculator](https://www.vahorizon.site/tools/cold-call-volume-calculator/): Funnel math showing daily dials needed, VAs required, and list size to hit a target deal count
- [MAO Calculator for Real Estate Wholesalers](https://www.vahorizon.site/tools/mao-calculator/): Calculates Maximum Allowable Offer using ARV, repair costs, assignment fee, and adjustable rule percentage (55-85%)
- [SMS Compliance Checker](https://www.vahorizon.site/tools/sms-compliance-checker/): 17-item checklist tool covering A2P 10DLC registration, TCPA consent, message content red flags, and volume/throughput limits

- [Refund Policy](https://www.vahorizon.site/refund-policy/): Refund and cancellation terms for staffing, CRM, and automation services

## Target Customer

U.S.-based real estate wholesalers doing 1-10 deals/month who want to scale outbound without building an in-house team. Cold calling volume, SMS follow-up, and CRM discipline handled by VA Horizon.
